eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Donley, TX; at 10:21 AM ON MAR 15, 2026 Effective until 10:51 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Donley County Emergency Management: EVACUATE NOW. Mandatory evacuation for the Western and Southern parts of Greenbelt Lake. LEAVE NOW. Fire located SW of Howardwick. Evacuate South using HWY 70. A shelter has been set up at Donley County Activity Center.
